name: Cubic Rebirth
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>方</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ほう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>界</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>輪</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>廻</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ね</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When an opponent's monster declares a direct attack: Target the attacking monster; your opponent Special Summons, in Attack Position, as many monsters as possible from their hand, Deck, and/or Graveyard with the same name as that monster, also, the ATK of the targeted monster and those Special Summoned monster(s) become 0 and place 1 Cubic Counter on each. (Monsters with a Cubic Counter cannot attack, also negate their effects.) Also, after that, if any Cubic Counters were placed by this effect, Special Summon 1 Level 4 or lower "Cubic" monster from your hand, ignoring its Summoning conditions.
eff: When an opponent's monster declares a direct attack: Target the attacking monster; your opponent Special Summons, in Attack Position, as many monsters as possible from their hand, Deck, and/or Graveyard with the same name as that monster, also, the ATK of the targeted monster and those Special Summoned monster(s) become 0 and place 1 Cubic Counter on each. (Monsters with a Cubic Counter cannot attack, also negate their effects.) Also, after that, if any Cubic Counters were placed by this effect, Special Summon 1 Level 4 or lower "Cubic" monster from your hand, ignoring its Summoning conditions.

sets.set: Yu-Gi-Oh! The Dark Side of Dimensions Movie Pack
Yu-Gi-Oh! The Dark Side of Dimensions Movie Pack: Gold Edition
Yu-Gi-Oh! The Dark Side of Dimensions Movie Pack Secret Edition

mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
summoning: Special Summons from your opponent's hand to your opponent's field
Special Summons from your opponent's Deck to your opponent's field
Special Summons from your opponent's Graveyard to your opponent's field
attack: Prevents your opponent's monsters from attacking
